feed.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions

entry.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions
entry.summary: Technical aggregators such as [Bitcoin Stack Exchange](https://bitcoin.stackexchange.com/), [Bitcoin Ops](https://bitcoinops.org), and [Bitcointalk](https://bitcointalk.org) are identified as high-level sources for training. These platforms can be instrumental for participants who are looking to engage deeply with technical content and community discussions related to Bitcoin and cryptocurrency technologies. Their potential in contributing significantly to training endeavors is highlighted, emphasizing their utility in specialized educational contexts where detailed and advanced knowledge is required.
